'''âb-l-m-m''' ('''kabalmemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:outblossom|outblossom]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-l-m-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:outblossom|outblossom]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-l-m-m
|-
! Lemma
| kabalmemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
